---
name: refactor
description: "Refactoring is the process of restructuring existing code without changing its external behavior."
argument-hint: "Provide the code or pull request you want to refactor"
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
compatibility: All
metadata:
  - type: refactor
---

Goal:
Improve structure without changing behavior

Actions:

- Extract reusable parts
- Improve naming
- Optimize performance
